ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state (e.g., AL, AK, AZ) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "population_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the state by population */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, Midwest, South, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* County seat of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the city belongs to */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" REAL /* Population of the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the state's population */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Median household income of the state */,
  "per_capita_income" REAL /* Per capita income of the state */,
  "male_population" REAL /* Male population of the state */,
  "female_population" REAL /* Female population of the state */,
  "under_18_population" REAL /* Population under 18 years old in the state */,
  "over_65_population" REAL /* Population over 65 years old in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the income data belongs to */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income of the state */,
  "per_capita_income" REAL /* Per capita income of the state */,
  "below_poverty_line" REAL /* Percentage of population below the poverty line in the state */,
  "median_earnings_male" REAL /* Median earnings for males in the state */,
  "median_earnings_female" REAL /* Median earnings for females in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_data" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the poverty data belongs to */,
  "poverty_count" REAL /* Number of people living in poverty in the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the state */,
  "below_100_percent_fpl" REAL /* Number of people living below 100% of the federal poverty level in the state */,
  "below_125_percent_fpl" REAL /* Number of people living below 125% of the federal poverty level in the state */,
  "below_150_percent_fpl" REAL /* Number of people living below 150% of the federal poverty level in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment_data" (
  "unemployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unemployment record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the unemployment data belongs to */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the state */,
  "labor_force" INTEGER /* Labor force in the state */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the state */,
  "civilian_labor_force" INTEGER /* Civilian labor force in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unemployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the education data belongs to */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate of the state */,
  "bachelor_degree_rate" REAL /* Bachelor's degree attainment rate of the state */,
  "master_degree_rate" REAL /* Master's degree attainment rate of the state */,
  "doctoral_degree_rate" REAL /* Doctoral degree attainment rate of the state */,
  "professional_degree_rate" REAL /* Professional degree attainment rate of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_data" (
  "healthcare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the healthcare data belongs to */,
  "uninsured_rate" REAL /* Uninsured rate of the state */,
  "insured_rate" REAL /* Insured rate of the state */,
  "medicaid_enrollment" INTEGER /* Medicaid enrollment in the state */,
  "medicare_enrollment" INTEGER /* Medicare enrollment in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("healthcare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the crime data belongs to */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Violent crime rate of the state */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Property crime rate of the state */,
  "murder_rate" REAL /* Murder rate of the state */,
  "rape_rate" REAL /* Rape rate of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the housing data belongs to */,
  "median_home_price" REAL /* Median home price of the state */,
  "homeownership_rate" REAL /* Homeownership rate of the state */,
  "renter_rate" REAL /* Renter rate of the state */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
